core_principle.statement: Brand experience is the perception of an engineering system in every interaction, not emotional marketing engagement.
core_principle.interpretation: Every touchpoint must reinforce the feeling of structured architectural engineering intelligence.

experience_architecture.system_flow: Awareness → Understanding → Trust → Validation → Engagement → Execution → Loyalty
experience_architecture.rule: Each stage must be driven by system clarity, not emotional persuasion

experience_layers.purpose: First impression of the brand as an engineering system

experience_layers.goal: User understands AvizSazeh as a system, not a product brand
Reduce perceived risk through system evidence
Shift interaction from marketing to engineering dialogue

touchpoint_rules.website: Must behave like engineering system interface

interaction_principles.name: System First Interaction
interaction_principles.description: Every interaction must introduce system logic before product detail

interaction_principles.name: Engineering Clarity
interaction_principles.description: No ambiguity or emotional persuasion in communication

interaction_principles.name: Progressive System Disclosure
interaction_principles.description: User understanding must evolve step-by-step through system layers

experience_design_rules.consistency: All channels must reflect same engineering system logic
experience_design_rules.clarity: No decorative or emotional inconsistency allowed
experience_design_rules.structure: All experiences must be modular and system-based
experience_design_rules.predictability: User journey must follow defined system flow

user_perception: This is not a brand, it is an engineering system
This company operates like a technical platform

strategic_goal.objective: Transform all brand interactions into engineering system experiences
strategic_goal.outcome: Consistent perception of AvizSazeh as an architectural engineering system authority
